CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF. PRESENT W/CERTIFL LAW STUDENT,JAMES DELONG AS ATTY.SET- TLED BY STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT -DEF.RETAINS POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 57 TAYLOR, #120, S.F, CA. - EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT STAYED ON FOLLOWING TERMS: DEF. TO PAY MARCH & APRIL RENTS UPON SIGNING STIP. ($650) - DEF. AGREES TO PAY $325 MONTHLY RENT BY 5TH OF EACH MO. STARTING MAY OF 1994 - PL. MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT BY PEXPARTE APPL. UPON 24HR. NOTICE TO DEF. ATTY. PL. IS TO DO THE FOLLOWING: REPAIR BATHROOM SINK - PEST CONTROL (SPRAYING) - REPAIR BATHROOM CEILING - UPON DEF. MAKING LAST PMT ON OCT. 5, 1994, THIS ACTION TO BE DISMISSED. PL. TO PREPARE NECESSARY PAPERS.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWBY, WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR ST #120, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT SHALL BE VACATED FOR ENTRY OF DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION W/PREJ. JUDGMENT OF JUN-07-1994 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
